info.title: Edmunds API
info.description: The Edmunds API provides access to an extensive dataset of vehicle information including specifications, pricing (True Market Value and True Cost to Own), editorial content, dealer information, safety ratings, recalls, maintenance schedules, consumer reviews, and vehicle photos. Authentication is via API key passed as a query parameter.

get.summary: Get a list of car makes
get.description: Returns a list of vehicle makes based on optional filters.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by vehicle state (e.g., NEW, USED, FUTURE)

200.description: Successful response with list of makes

get.summary: Get total count of car makes
get.description: Returns the total number of car makes.

get.summary: Get details on a specific car make
get.description: Returns detailed information for a specific vehicle manufacturer.

parameters.name: make
parameters.description: The nice name of the make (e.g., honda, toyota)

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by vehicle state (e.g., NEW, USED, FUTURE)

get.summary: Get a list of car models
get.description: Returns a list of vehicle models based on filters.

parameters.name: makeNiceName
parameters.description: Filter results by vehicle make nice name (e.g., honda)

200.description: Successful response with list of models

get.summary: Get years with styles for a car make/model
get.description: Returns the model years of a specific car make/model with optional filters.

parameters.name: make
parameters.description: The nice name of the make (e.g., lexus)

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The nice name of the model (e.g., rx350)

get.summary: Get a list of model years via filters
get.description: Returns relevant information about model years based on filters.

parameters.name: makeNiceName
parameters.description: The nice name of the make (e.g., honda)

parameters.name: modelNiceName
parameters.description: The nice name of the model (e.g., accord)

get.summary: Get a list of vehicle styles
get.description: Returns styles for a specific car make/model with pagination.

parameters.name: makeNiceName
parameters.description: The nice name of the make (e.g., honda)

parameters.name: modelNiceName
parameters.description: The nice name of the model (e.g., civic)

200.description: Successful response with list of styles

get.summary: Get engines for a car style
get.description: Returns engine details for a specific vehicle style.

get.summary: Get transmissions for a car style
get.description: Returns transmission details for a specific vehicle style.

get.summary: Get color details by ID
get.description: Returns color details for a specific vehicle color ID.

get.summary: Get vehicle equipment list
get.description: Returns vehicle equipment details using various filters. Equipment types include AUDIO_SYSTEM, COLOR, ENGINE, FEE, HOLDBACK, OPTION, TELEMATICS, TIRES, TRANSMISSION, WARRANTY, WHEELS.

get.summary: Decode a VIN
get.description: Decodes a supplied VIN to retrieve basic vehicle specifications including make, model, year, style, trim, engine and transmission details. This is not a VIN lookup but uses a Squish VIN reduction mechanism.

200.description: Successful response with decoded VIN data

get.summary: Decode a Squish VIN
get.description: Decodes a Squish VIN (first 11 digits of VIN minus the 9th check digit) into basic vehicle specs including make, model, year, style, trim, engine and transmission details.

parameters.name: squishVin
parameters.description: The Squish VIN (first 11 digits of VIN minus the 9th digit check digit)

200.description: Successful response with decoded Squish VIN data

get.summary: Get TMV for a new car by style ID and ZIP code
get.description: Calculates the True Market Value pricing for a new vehicle based on style ID and ZIP code.

get.summary: Get TMV by new car VIN, MSRP, and ZIP code
get.description: Returns True Market Value pricing for a new vehicle using its VIN.

200.description: Successful response with VIN-based TMV pricing

get.summary: Get TMV for a used car by style ID and more
get.description: Calculates the True Market Value pricing for a used vehicle based on style ID, condition, mileage, and ZIP code.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: The vehicle condition (e.g., Outstanding, Clean, Average, Rough, Damaged)

200.description: Successful response with used car TMV pricing

get.summary: Get TMV for used vehicle with typically equipped options
get.description: Calculates the True Market Value pricing for a used vehicle with typically equipped options.

200.description: Successful response with typically equipped used TMV pricing

get.summary: Get TMV for a certified vehicle
get.description: Returns True Market Value pricing for a certified pre-owned vehicle.

200.description: Successful response with certified vehicle TMV pricing

get.summary: Get car makes with TCO value
get.description: Returns a list of car makes that have True Cost to Own data available.

200.description: Successful response with makes having TCO data

get.summary: Get car models with TCO value
get.description: Returns a list of car models that have True Cost to Own data available.

parameters.name: makeid
parameters.description: The make ID to filter models

200.description: Successful response with models having TCO data

get.summary: Get TCO for a new car
get.description: Returns the True Cost to Own five-year ownership cost estimate for a new vehicle by style ID and ZIP code.

get.summary: Get total cash price for a new car
get.description: Returns the total cash price for a new vehicle by style ID and ZIP code.

200.description: Successful response with total cash price

get.summary: Get maintenance schedule by car model year ID
get.description: Returns the maintenance schedule for a vehicle based on its model year ID. Frequency IDs indicate service types: 1-2 for A/B-service, 3 for one-time at exact value, 4 for recurring intervals, 5 for more frequent, 6 for warning-light triggered, 7-9 for manufacturer inspections.

get.summary: Get vehicle recalls by model year ID
get.description: Returns vehicle manufacturer recall data for a specific model year ID.

get.summary: Get safety ratings by make/model/year
get.description: Returns safety ratings for a vehicle by make, model, and year.

get.summary: Get safety ratings by style ID
get.description: Returns safety ratings for a vehicle by its style ID.

get.summary: Get consumer ratings and reviews by make/model/year
get.description: Returns user-generated vehicle ratings and reviews submitted on Edmunds.com.

200.description: Successful response with ratings and reviews

get.summary: Get consumer ratings and reviews by style ID
get.description: Returns user-generated vehicle ratings and reviews for a specific style ID.

200.description: Successful response with ratings and reviews

get.summary: Get editorial articles
get.description: Returns articles written by Edmunds staff, filterable by category, make, model, and year.

get.summary: Get editor reviews
get.description: Returns Edmunds editor reviews with pros, cons, and component reviews (Safety, Powertrain, What's New, Driving and Handling, etc.).

get.summary: Get expert content for a vehicle
get.description: Returns expert editorial content for a specific vehicle make, model, and year.

get.summary: Get dealer franchises by dealership ID
get.description: Returns franchise information for a specific dealership.

200.description: Successful response with dealer franchise data

get.summary: Get dealer ratings and reviews by dealer ID
get.description: Returns ratings and reviews for a specific dealer.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

post.description: Submits a comment on a dealer review.

get.summary: Get vehicle photos by make/model/year
get.description: Returns photo content for a vehicle by make, model, and year.

apiKey.name: api_key
apiKey.description: Edmunds API key. Must be appended to every request URL.

frequencyId.description: Frequency type: 1-2 A/B-service, 3 one-time, 4 recurring, 5 more frequent, 6 warning-light, 7-9 manufacturer inspections

tags.name: Vehicle Specs
tags.description: Vehicle specification data including makes, models, years, styles, engines, transmissions, colors, and equipment

tags.name: Pricing
tags.description: True Market Value (TMV) and True Cost to Own (TCO) pricing data

tags.name: Service
tags.description: Maintenance schedules, recalls, and safety ratings

tags.name: Editorial
tags.description: Edmunds editorial articles, editor reviews, and expert content
